retrieved_result: Foil-Baked New Potatoes Jun 25, 2007Alan Richardson A weekend spent in the great outdoors builds hearty appetites. Serve this dish with our Herb-Stuffed Grilled Trout and Sage-Buttered Corn on the Cob, then use the leftover potatoes to make a hearty send-off breakfast. Ingredients Yields: 8 Cal/Serv: 1523 lb. new potatoes2
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result is a recipe about potatoes, not about easy DIY room decoration ideas.
